navbar.noNotifications: No new notifications. Sync lab/appointment integrations in Settings when available.

overview.appointmentsOff: Appointments panel is toggled off in settings. Turn it on to show upcoming items again.
overview.appointmentsEmpty: No appointments scheduled. Once you connect a calendar, items will appear here.
overview.criticalOff: Critical Alerts are toggled off in settings. Enable them to see this bar when active critical patients exist.
overview.criticalEmpty: No critical cases in your registry. Patients marked as 'Critical' will be surfaced here.
overview.criticalBanner: There is 1 critical patient requiring attention
overview.criticalBanner_plural: There are {{count}} critical patients requiring attention
overview.reviewList: Review the list below or open the patient registry.
overview.infoNote: Registry rows persist in this browser (localStorage). Vital monitoring entries use the Carevia API with MySQL or in-memory storage — open a patient detail to add flexible medical records.

patients.title: Patients
patients.description: Search, sort, and export your registry. Add records using the primary action below.
patients.noPatients: No patients yet. Use "Add Patient" to create your first record.

patientDetail.noteHint: e.g. Follow-up call, medication adjustment, next steps...
patientDetail.noFollowUps: No follow-ups yet. Add one using the form above.
patientDetail.noteRequired: Enter a note for this follow-up.
patientDetail.notFoundDesc: This record may have been removed.

newPatient.title: New Patient
newPatient.description: Add a new patient to your clinical registry.
newPatient.diagnosisRequired: Please enter a diagnosis or notes.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.description: Schedule and review visits. This section is ready for real data hooks.
appointments.emptyDetail: No calendar connected. Use the patients section to maintain your registry in the meantime.

labs.title: Lab Results
labs.description: Clinical lab outputs and test reports for your patients.
labs.emptyDetail: No lab feeds configured. The overview displays the pending lab count you can link your system to.

records.title: Medical records & monitoring
records.description: Flexible JSON vitals per visit, disease templates, custom fields, and simple rule-based flags. Stored on the Carevia API (MySQL or in-memory for demos).
records.noRecords: No monitoring entries yet. Use "Add record" to capture vitals for any disease.
records.apiNote: Start the API with npm run server (optional MySQL via .env).
records.recordsDescription: Clinical documents and filings. Add document storage or EHR links to populate this view.
records.noRecordsDesc: This area is intentionally empty. Attach uploads or API-driven documents when you extend the app.
records.otherNote: No preset fields for "Other". Add custom measurements below.
records.customNote: Optional — any vital or lab label.
records.validationError: Add at least one measurement or a clinical note.

analytics.description: Registry overview, status distribution, and demo vital trends per patient.
analytics.noAnalyticsDesc: Add patients from the Patients tab to see charts and breakdowns here.
analytics.vitalTrendsDesc: Synthetic time series derived from each patient ID for visualization only—not clinical data.
analytics.noGlucose: No glucose series for this selection.
analytics.noBP: No blood pressure series for this selection.
analytics.noWeight: No weight series for this selection.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: How you appear in the workspace. Changes are saved on this device only.
profile.guestNote: Guest session: create an account from the home page to sign in on future visits.
profile.notLinkedEmail: Not linked to an account email.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your clinical workspace, appearance, and data preferences.
settings.appearanceDesc: Toggle between light and dark modes to suit your environment.
settings.languageDesc: Change the interface language. Changes apply immediately.
settings.highlightsDesc: Toggle which sections appear on your main overview.
settings.labResultsDesc: Show pending lab count on overview
settings.compactTablesDesc: Reduce row padding for dense data views
settings.keyboardHintsDesc: Show shortcut prompts for common actions
settings.dataDesc: Your data is stored locally in this browser. Backup or clear it below.
settings.aboutDesc: Carevia is a clinical archivist designed for modern medical workflows, focusing on simplicity and flexibility.
